runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.14) in a Class 5, finishing a 4 length fourth. Has seven successes and 12 minors from 27 starts from box 2. Tough ask.

formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.14) in a Class 5, finishing a 4 length fourth. Has seven successes and 12 minors from 27 starts from box 2. Tough ask.

runners.formComment: Strong performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.3 lengths in a Class 4 last start at this track, recording an enormous 17.03 over the 295m journey. Prepared to risk.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance showing plenty of speed to score by 1.3 lengths in a Class 4 last start at this track, recording an enormous 17.03 over the 295m journey. Prepared to risk.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Dragged down around bend faltered, contacted, trailed and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (17.11) over 295m at this track. Tough field and appears tested.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but placed two on end prior to that, the latest at double-figure odds when third (17.11) over 295m at this track. Tough field and appears tested.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 295m. Last start finished 4th over 305m at Wanganui beaten 5 lengths (18.00) behind Rosapenna in a Class 5 H on April 10. Boasts a course and distance PB in a scintillating 16.75. Nicely placed and should go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 295m. Last start finished 4th over 305m at Wanganui beaten 5 lengths (18.00) behind Rosapenna in a Class 5 H on April 10. Boasts a course and distance PB in a scintillating 16.75. Nicely placed and should go well.

runners.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Ascot Park over 390m in 22.38 last start, beating Homebush Alfie. Has run blistering time here with a 16.9 PB at the distance. Expected to run well again.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at his last couple, most recently over 295m at this track in a handy 16.85 beating Gotcha Santana. Form from this draw is very strong, including two wins. Likely to be in the finish.

runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by 1.3 lengths at this track (17.08) beating Opawa Opie in a Class 4 on March 12. Racing well and has to be included.
